scripts.dev:full: set "NEXUSFORGE_DESKTOP_PROFILE_DIR=%CD%\apps\desktop\.electron-profile" && set "NEXUSFORGE_DESKTOP_CACHE_DIR=%CD%\apps\desktop\.electron-cache" && wait-on tcp:3000 tcp:4000 && electron --user-data-dir=%NEXUSFORGE_DESKTOP_PROFILE_DIR% --disk-cache-dir=%NEXUSFORGE_DESKTOP_CACHE_DIR% --disable-gpu-shader-disk-cache .
scripts.package:win: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; if (Test-Path 'release\NexusForge Desktop-win32-x64') { Remove-Item 'release\NexusForge Desktop-win32-x64' -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path 'release\win-unpacked') { Remove-Item 'release\win-unpacked' -Recurse -Force }; exit 0" && set "PATH=%CD%\node_modules\7zip-bin\win\x64;%PATH%" && npx electron-builder --win nsis --publish never
